title: Decision Planning Summary (generic <decision_planning_summary> + legacy <technical_decision_planning_summary>/adr.* alias)
description: Declarative source of truth for the transient /plan-decision -> /write-decision handoff block. Validates the generic <decision_planning_summary> and the legacy <technical_decision_planning_summary> tag + adr.* field alias (GH-46 back-compat, DM-2). Carries the GH-60 hard_requirements list DISTINCT from decision_drivers; hard_requirements items carry a negotiable (yes|no) field to support the best-effort non-negotiable-violation check. Zero live instances persist under doc/ (SD-3); correctness is proven by synthetic fixtures under tools/.tests/fixtures/planning-summary/. The validator is invoked on demand via --summary (DEC-16); it is NOT CI-gated over live docs.
$comment: This schema models a single canonical JSON shape. Legacy adr.* aliases are accepted by normalizing them onto the canonical keys (decision_id<-adr.id, decision_type<-adr.type, title<-adr.title, slug<-adr.slug) in tools/validate-decision-record --summary before validation; the generic and legacy-alias fixtures are both accepted via this mapping (AC-GH63-3).

slug.description: Canonical field; legacy alias adr.slug. Optional.

classification.description: Optional classification inputs (reuse the front-matter classification shape).

hard_requirements.description: Binary pass/fail gates (constraints), DISTINCT from decision_drivers (GH-60). hard_requirements ∩ decision_drivers must be empty (AC-GH63-5).

decision_drivers.description: Continuous preferences the decision optimizes for; tradeable. Must be disjoint from hard_requirements factors.

alternatives.description: Candidate options including the chosen one. Each carries constraint_compliance to support the best-effort non-negotiable-violation check (AC-GH63-6).

adr.description: LEGACY alias block (GH-46 back-compat). When present, adr.id/adr.type/adr.title/adr.slug normalize onto decision_id/decision_type/title/slug. Accepted alongside the canonical fields (NFR-2).

x-coverage-rules.$comment: Planning-summary cross-field rules read by the coverage check (AC-GH63-15).

rules.description: hard_requirements factors and decision_drivers must be disjoint (intersection empty)
Legacy adr.* alias block is accepted via normalization (no behavior change)
Best-effort: chosen option violating a negotiable:no constraint emits a non-blocking [HEURISTIC]/[WARN] warning, exit 0
